title: Test Krea2 as an editor (edit nodes + Raw fallback)
description: Krea2 Turbo re-composes but cannot edit. Test turning Krea2 into an editor model using upstream edit resources: https://huggingface.co/conradlocke/krea2-identity-edit (identity-edit weights) + https://github.com/lbouaraba/comfyui-krea2edit (ComfyUI edit nodes). Builder-Pod spike: install nodes, wire an edit workflow, run live. MAIN GOAL = get a real instruct-edit working. FALLBACK: if Turbo (distilled cfg 1.0) starves the edit conditioning and looks bad, test Krea2 Raw (52-step, phase 2) — the extra steps + working cfg may be what the edit path needs. This is the first concrete reason to build Raw. Details in docs/models/krea2/README.md 'To test — Krea2 as an EDITOR'.

attention.reason: RunPod remote pass complete (MPI-324 sweep, RTX 2000): t2i, i2i, depth, upscale, masked edit + 2-character edit all clean. Accel LoRA resolved (clean non-degraded output = no silent LoRA miss). Step-count result-verified, not console-counted.
